patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..a50d6cb 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -56,9 +56,10 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
             async with async_timeout(timeout):
                 try:
                     await self.future
-                    self.future.result()
                 except asyncio.CancelledError:
                     pass
+            if not isinstance(self.future.exception(), asyncio.CancelledError):
+                self.future.result()
         finally:
             if not self.future.done():
                 self.future.cancel()
@@ -132,6 +133,6 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
         start = time.monotonic()
         while time.monotonic() - start < timeout:
             if not self.output_queue.empty():
-                return False
+                return True
             await asyncio.sleep(interval)
-        return self.output_queue.empty()
+        return not self.output_queue.empty()
\ No newline at end of file
